to the process of reduction etc. yields the Ayus. I0y-9m-27d-52g.
In the case of Venus the reduction is one half. The two first
products are 286 and 132. So the grand total, 418. yields only
0y-!m-29d-l Ig, In the case of Saturn the two products are
1S6 and 92. The grand total of 20S after reduction etc. yields
!5y-l lm-6d-20g. If you add up the contributions of all the
seven planets so obtained, you will get the total longevity or
span of life of the native. In this case the total comes to 62yrs-
5m-lid. and 46 ghatis. According to many authorities there
is no contribution to the span of life by the Ascendant.
In connection with this Astakavarga you will often come
across the term Sodhyapinda. It means the aggregate of the
benefic dots remaining in an A.Y. chart after the two correc-
tions viz. Trikona and Ekadhipatya-Sodhanas. I have told
you that you have to use the A.V. chart of that planet which
